findings.title: Outdated Express 4.17.1 with known vulnerabilities
findings.description: Express 4.17.1 has known security vulnerabilities including open redirect issues patched in later versions

findings.title: Lodash 4.17.20 with prototype pollution
findings.description: Lodash 4.17.20 vulnerable to prototype pollution via _.merge() used in inventory import

findings.title: Outdated axios 0.21.1 with SSRF and header leakage
findings.description: Axios 0.21.1 has CVE-2023-45857 XSRF token exposure and SSRF vulnerabilities

findings.title: EJS 3.1.5 with server-side template injection
findings.description: EJS 3.1.5 vulnerable to CVE-2022-29078 SSTI exploitable via user-controlled template in label generation

findings.title: Marked 2.0.0 with ReDoS and XSS vulnerabilities
findings.description: Marked 2.0.0 has ReDoS and XSS vulnerabilities exploitable via user-controlled markdown input
